name: Odoo MCP Server
what_it_does: Odoo MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Odoo ERP — querying sales orders and CRM leads, managing inventory and accounting records, accessing HR data, executing Odoo business workflows, and integrating Odoo's comprehensive business management suite into agent-driven business process automation workflows.
use_cases: Querying sales opportunities and pipeline from CRM automation agents
Managing inventory and stock levels from supply chain agents
Accessing customer invoices and accounting data from finance agents
Generating business reports from analytics agents
Processing purchase orders and vendor management from procurement agents
Managing HR records and payroll from HR automation agents
not_for: Teams using SAP, NetSuite, or other ERP systems
Simple task management (Odoo is full ERP — overkill for simple workflows)
best_when: An agent needs to interact with an Odoo ERP deployment — for business process automation, CRM management, or financial data access in organizations running Odoo.
avoid_when: You're using SAP, NetSuite, Quickbooks, or other business systems — use those specific integrations.

auth.notes: Odoo XML-RPC authentication with URL, database name, username, and password/API key. Odoo 14+ supports API keys as alternative to password. All credentials needed for connection.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Odoo Community Edition: free and open source
pricing.notes: Odoo Community is free and open source. Enterprise edition adds advanced features. MCP server is community open source and free.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on Odoo deployment; self-hosted has no external limits

known_agent_gotchas: Odoo XML-RPC requires database name — not just URL and credentials
Odoo version compatibility: API changes between v14, v15, v16, v17 — verify version
Record IDs in Odoo are internal database IDs — not human-readable
Odoo domain search syntax is specific: [('field', 'operator', 'value')] format
Write operations on business records affect production data immediately
Community MCP (racksync) — Odoo API surface is large; coverage may be incomplete
agent_readiness.security_notes: TLS recommended for Odoo connections. Credentials in environment variables. Community MCP. Use Odoo API key instead of password when possible. Create dedicated low-privilege Odoo user for agent access.

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS for remote Odoo. API key preferred over password. Community MCP. Dedicated low-privilege Odoo user for agents.
